scores.correctness_notes: Fully correct YAML with all required sections. Extra fields (on-success, on-failure, backoff-delay/factor/limit) are valid Pebble service parameters, not errors. Log target uses list syntax for services rather than bracket notation — both are valid YAML. Charm usage tip about container.add_layer is a correct bonus detail.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — on-success, on-failure, backoff-delay, backoff-factor, backoff-limit are all real Pebble service configuration fields
